title: UR-SKILL Frontmatter Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating UR-SKILL.md YAML frontmatter. Extends agentskills.io specification with UR-SKILL custom metadata fields.

name.description: Unique SKILL identifier in kebab-case. Must be 1-64 chars, lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens only. No leading/trailing hyphens, no consecutive hyphens. Must match parent directory name. (agentskills.io required)

description.description: Trigger condition and capability description. Should describe what the skill does AND when to use it. Strongly recommended to start with 'Use when...'. (agentskills.io required)

license.description: SPDX license identifier or bundled license filename. E.g., 'Apache-2.0', 'MIT', 'Proprietary. LICENSE.txt has complete terms'. (agentskills.io optional)

compatibility.description: Environment requirements: intended product, required system packages, network access, etc. Only include if the skill has specific requirements. (agentskills.io optional)

allowed-tools.description: Space-separated list of pre-approved tool names the skill may use. Experimental field - support varies by agent implementation. (agentskills.io optional, experimental)

updated.description: Last updated date in YYYY-MM-DD format. (UR-SKILL required)

type.description: SKILL type: 'prompt' (pure prompt, no scripts/resources), 'tool' (executable scripts), 'hybrid' (prompt + scripts/resources). (UR-SKILL required)

whenToUse.description: Supplementary trigger scenario in Chinese, complementary to description without duplication. (UR-SKILL required)

metadata.description: UR-SKILL custom metadata block. Extends agentskills.io optional metadata with required UR-SKILL fields.

examples.name: python-code-review
examples.description: Use when the user wants to review Python code for quality, security, style, or performance. Invoke for code inspection, bug hunting, refactoring suggestions.

metadata.whenToUse: 当用户需要审查 Python 代码质量、安全漏洞、风格或性能时

examples.name: ur-skill-en
examples.description: Use whenever the user wants to create, design, standardize, or package a SKILL.md file, AI agent skill, or structured system prompt. Invoke even if they don't explicitly say 'SKILL'. English version.
examples.compatibility: Designed for Trae IDE and any Agent Skills compatible platform. Requires Python 3.12+ (for validate_skill.py).
examples.allowed-tools: Read Write Grep Glob RunCommand WebSearch WebFetch Skill Task AskUserQuestion TodoWrite

metadata.whenToUse: When the user says 'create a skill for me', 'write a skill', 'optimize this skill', or any casual request to generate or improve a skill
